files.text:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xs:schema xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"
           targetNamespace="https://example.com/comments/v1"
           xmlns:c="https://example.com/comments/v1"
           elementFormDefault="qualified">
  <xs:element name="comment">
    <xs:complexType>
      <xs:sequence>
        <xs:any processContents="skip" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
      </xs:sequence>
    </xs:complexType>
  </xs:element>
</xs:schema>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xs:schema xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"
           targetNamespace="https://example.com/comments/v1"
           xmlns:c="https://example.com/comments/v1"
           elementFormDefault="qualified">
  <xs:element name="comment">
    <xs:complexType>
      <xs:sequence>
        <xs:element name="author">
          <xs:simpleType>
            <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
              <xs:maxLength value="80"/>
            </xs:restriction>
          </xs:simpleType>
        </xs:element>
        <xs:element name="body">
          <xs:simpleType>
            <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
              <xs:maxLength value="4000"/>
            </xs:restriction>
          </xs:simpleType>
        </xs:element>
      </xs:sequence>
    </xs:complexType>
  </xs:element>
</xs:schema>
